title: acilepis chiangdaoensis
intro: Acilepis chiangdaoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Chieng Dao Acilepis. It is native to Thailand and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from symptoms of colds and flu. Acilepis chiangdaoensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
